feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Random product selection in SAP EWM Cycle Counting?
entry.content: If we are using EWM Cycle Counting and let's say our interval is 180 days for indicator "A". After the 180 days is up and cycle counting starts over, does the system pick the same products in exact same order for new count? Or is there a way to force system to pick products assigned to "A" randomly, which is what the business desires.

entry.title: A question about SMQ2 Logical Unit Of Work size limitations
entry.content: Our customer had a situation where they tried to push 77k transactions in one logical unit of work and the transactions went into SYSFAIL status with a time out situation after processing for a long time.  They had to chunk it up into smaller LUW's to get it to work and they asked what is the size limitation on LUW's.  I can't find any documentation on that, and wondered if the hive mind had a number or a solution.  Would it be to just keep expanding the timeout parameter?

entry.title: SAP EWM Addition to stock putaway strategy
entry.content:
I have specific requirement from client that while doing the put-away of product "A", system should search the bins where the same product "A" exists and suggest the same bin according to remaining capacity in that bin. For the remaining stock of the product "A", system shouldn't search empty bin but rather do the put-away in any bin if capacity allows. 

In current system, all bins are with mixed product.

To map this requirement, I have configured put-away rule as Addition to stock/empty bins and also allowed mixed storage without any limitation. Everything works fine with this set-up, but client wants not to look for empty bin and wants the system to suggest other bin which is partially occupied and having the enough capacity. Please advise if this is possible to achieve with any BADI or any other configuration is required?

Thanks

entry.title: HU information not getting updated in SAP TM for Inbound delivery scenario
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on a S4 Side car TM/EWM implementation, where we have inbound delivery based TM integration and TM-EWM integration is based on TU.

I am trying to get the HU/ Pallets in SAP TM from EWM. But system is not updating Freight unit or Freight order with Pallet/HU information. Where as the Charge calculation is based on Pallet quantity.

As per SAP, system allow HU update only via LDAP, if LDAP is applicable.
But if I follow Arrival at check point> Unload start> GR >>> HU gets updated in S4 from EWM and then S4 tries to update TM with HU.

If inbound scenario with HU is possible then kindly share the steps. 

Looking for your support.

Regards,

Krishnendu

entry.title: WM Cycle Count Questions
entry.content:
Client is looking to create Cycle Count Physical Inventory document via Interface and need some clarification. I have checked help and api hub and it appears there is no api to create Cycle Count Physical Inventory document.

1- Is there any interface to create Cycle Count Physical Inventory documents via api?

2- Is there any way NOT to block the product when Cycle Count Physical Inventory document is created. Requirement is to create PI document but product should be able to move in and out of the bin.

3- Where Last Cycle Count Date stored in WM?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to save HU without serial number assignment in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Dear, Community

We have a requirement, which we need to print out HU label during EWM inbound delivery. Next, assign the Serial number to the HU later.

1. Our serial number is already uploaded while initially creating the inbound delivery.
2. However, when we create auto HU label according to the packspecs in SCWM/PACK we cannot save without assigning the serial numbers. We tried to do Auto Hu creation in IBD. However, for that we could not adjust the HU quantity and save.

We attached the error.

Are there anyways to work around it?

Thank you very much,

 

EWM - Delivery Processing

entry.title: Rounding Whole wts to available qty
entry.content:
Hello expert , 

As i have requirement to pick whole HU from storage type not the partial qty. i tried with all configuration of round wts to available qty in wpt and storage type but still its not working in my scenerio ? please help me out !! 

#sap

Thanks !!

entry.title: Deconsolidation
entry.content:
Hello Experts , 

 

I'm having one issue with Deconsolidation. 

When a product X and Y are packed in the same HU, the system works fine. There is no issue. 

However, sometimes vendors send only X or Y products or both in different HUs individually. In this case, also the system is considered for Deconsolidation which we do not want. 

The requirement is when the product comes individually or separate system should not go to the DECON Work Center. 

Can anybody help me in achieving this? Thanks in Advance. 

 

Thanks and Regards

KP

entry.title: Is is possible to have an event trigger a cycle count after the bin shows picked clean in SAP EWM.
entry.content:
We have a customer that would like for PI be created on the event that picking task has picked a bin clean. 

They want to do this to verifiy that bin is actually empty. This event will trigger after the pick .

Can this acheived outside of the ABC indicators

entry.title: Pick Labels getting mixed during Printing
entry.content:
Hello Expert,
Has anyone of you have experienced this issue and got any solution on that?
 
During Picking Process, operator press - Print HU Labels, it gets printed, and operator collects them. But multiple operators are pressing Print HU from their devices, and this is causing mixing of HU Labels.
Requirement is all HU Labels for each operator / warehouse order should get printed sequentially and then it should print for operator / wo.
 
Regards,
Avdhoot

entry.title: EWM-TM Integration with Advanced Shipping & Receiving functionality (ASR)
entry.content:
I am currently working on EWM-TM Integration with Advanced Shipping & Receiving functionality (ASR).
From EWM Side, picking and packing is completed and the DSH status is also set to “Ready”.

Now to perform loading and PGI from load/unload freight order App. We don’t see the packaging material updated in the freight order and also, the warehouse processing completed tab is RED.

This is not letting us perform loading in the load/unload freight order app.

I am assuming once the packing material is updated in FO then only the warehouse processing status completed tab turns GREEN?

entry.title: Loading not possible; HU is not ready for loading
entry.content:
While performing "Set to Loaded" in Freight Order, I am getting the below error as

"Loading not possible; HU XXXXXXX is not ready for loading". Though my HU is at GI-ZONE and the HU details is already updated in the Freight Order.

This is for Advanced Shipping & Receiving scenario.

SAP Transportation Management SAP Extended Warehouse Management

entry.title: Stock category BB to FF via Create Posting Change App in S4HC
entry.content:
When trying to move the stock from Blocked (BB) to unrestricted (FF) within WM (1750 warehouse code) using 'Create Posting Change' app, I am getting the error " Could not find the source stock".

The stock is available in the warehouse and there are no open warehouse tasks (2nd screen shot).

Please let me know if i am missing any config or what would be the issue. Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Loading End and Departure message identifier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

This has reference to our production environment (PEW) where incoming Loading End and Departure messages for FO is coming almost at the same time from EWM-->TM.

Loading End was reported at 10:12:39 and Departure was reported at 10:12:50.

Can you please help us to know if there exists an identifier using which we would be able to differentiate a Loading End message with Departure message.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Stock Room Management and SAP TM in S/4HANA
entry.content: Dear all, an Integration between SAP LE-TRA and Stock Room Management is possible in my eyes at the moment in S/4HANA. But after 2030 when SAP stop the support of LE-TRA, then there is not integration anymore with Stock Room Managment. What should the client do? Is an integration between SAP TM and Stock Room Management in S/4HANA possible? If yes, how is this possible between both Systems?

entry.title: Auto warehouse task creation not working for return purchase order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a return purchase order with batch updated in the purchase order. I created a delivery and ODO created in the S4 HANA embedded 2023 system.

Auto picking warehouse task is not creating, but when I try manually system is picking stock automatically.

I have maintained the condition records with action definition "/SCWM/PDO_01_WT_CREATE".

normally sales order its picking fine.

Please let me know if I am missing any configuration or it is standard behaviour.

entry.title: Scanning transactions for the warehouse in SAP Fiori / S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear all,

Which scanner transactions offers SAP Fiori for the Warehouse Management?

Which possibilties or Apps are there in SAP EWM? 

In SAP ECC we used the LM-Transactions for the Warehouse, and it was systemguided / driven or user driven.

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Define Storage Bin Structure
entry.content: I would like Define Storage Bin Structure like on screen but still I have error message. Please for advice how I should resolve the problem.

entry.title: Create JOB /SCWM/CHM_LOG
entry.content: Hello everyone. I want create a job CHM_LOG. But when I run the LOG_ACT I see this error message. Can anyone help me to solve the problem?

entry.title: zodstm difference
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some difference stock in T-CODE ZODSTM PE1 bettwen SAP and LSP partner system.Is there any way we can clear this difference ?

Thanks
